posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Connect & Innovate: Making product development a team sport.

Calling all product and development leaders! Get ready for an incredible virtual event by
monday dev.

Date: Tuesday, March 19th
Time: 11pm NY / 3pm London / 3pm Sydney.
Location: This event takes place in monday mansion, a virtual event space unlike any you’ve experienced.
Registration link: https://monday.com/ap/dev-event

To deliver outstanding products, collaboration between product managers, developers, client-facing teams, and leadership is key. Join to hear keynotes on this topic, network with your industry peers, and explore our product, monday dev.Our amazing speakers.

Elena Verna - Head of growth at Dropbox
Bosky Mukherjee - Founder of PMDojo
Broadus Palmer‍ - Founder of LevelUp

Save your spot via this link
